From The Coach
Coaching Corner
🧠
Mental Game
Win the Point
Before It Starts

Tennis is 50% physical and 50% mental — but most players only train one half. The mental game isn't about staying calm; it's about being present, focused, and trusting your preparation when pressure is highest.

Between every point, reset with a ritual: look at your strings, take one breath, bounce twice. This trains your brain to stay in the moment — not replay the last point or fear the next one. Champions aren't born fearless. They train their mind as hard as their forehand.

Ask Coach Mario about the Delete Fear methodology — a personalized mental coaching program that changes how you compete.

🎾
Technical Focus
The Foundation:
Footwork First

Every great shot starts two steps before you hit it. Footwork is the single most underrated technical skill in tennis — and the one that separates good players from great ones.

This spring we're emphasizing the split step, recovery positioning, and lateral agility across all programs. When your feet are in the right place, the swing, the contact, the follow-through — all become natural and repeatable.

Technical drills, video analysis, and personalized feedback available through private lessons. Book at tennispromario.com.

🧠 The Delete Fear Methodology
Coach Mario's signature mental performance system helps players overcome the psychological barriers that hold them back. Stop choking on big points. Stop freezing under pressure. Start playing the tennis you practice.
Learn More About Mental Coaching →
Mental Performance
Tip of the Week
🏆 Confidence Building
Building Unshakeable Confidence
Confidence is not something you are born with — it is built through preparation and repetition. Every time you practice a shot under pressure, every time you push through a tough drill, every time you do a practice swing emphasizing the solution — you are creating the correct muscle memory, and making a deposit in your confidence bank. On match day, you draw from that account. Build your confidence in practice so it is there when you need it most.
ML
